design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed = hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) -> selects workflow-command-center hero, Outfit typography, gapless-bento-grid + workflow-playbook-timeline + implementation-checklist components, GSAP paradigms = scrubbed-word-reveal & hover-physics. AIDA Check: Attention (hero), Interest (proof + market context), Desire (computer-use cache + workflows), Action (CTA band). Font Selection: Outfit from allowed list. Hero Math Verification: max-width supports 2–3 line H1 with clamp sizing. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow: dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded CDN usage. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary black pill CTA, secondary white CTA verified.
headline: Text message AI assistant that actually gets things done

site_brief.audience: people who want to text an AI assistant instead of opening another app
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Text message AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Text message AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super turns SMS-style requests into real computer actions, follow-ups, reminders, and app workflows

summary: A practical field guide to using Super as a text message AI assistant that can turn SMS-style requests into real computer actions, follow-ups, and reusable workflows — without opening another app.
